zh.lifeSummary: 當Anthony Kingston於1490年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾潘斯維其可時，他的父親William Kingston14歲，母親Mary Scrope14歲。他於大約1520年與Lady Dorothy Harpur在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1556年4月14日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾希雷斯特享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾潘斯維其可。

nameMeanings.name: Kingston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places throughout England called Kingston or Kingstone. Almost all of them derive from Old English cyning, cing ‘king’ (genitive cyninges, cinges) + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though some have a different etymology, such as Kingston on Soar in Nottinghamshire, which derives from Old English cyne ‘royal’ + stān ‘stone’.

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

en.lifeSummary: When Anthony Kingston was born in 1490, in Painswick, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Kingston, was 14 and his mother, Mary Scrope, was 14. He married Lady Dorothy Harpur about 1520, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 14 April 1556, in Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66, and was buried in Painswick, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Lady Dorothy Harpur environ 1520, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1556, à Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Painswick, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Anthony Kingston(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 파인스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Kingston(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Scrope(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Lady Dorothy Harpur(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1556년 4월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 시렌스스터에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 파인스윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Kingston nasceu em 1490, em Painswick, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Kingston, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Mary Scrope, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Dorothy Harpur aproximadamente 1520, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1556, em Cirencester, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Painswick, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anthony Kingston родился в 1490 г. в местности пеинсвикк, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Kingston было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Scrope, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Dorothy Harpur около 1520 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 апреля 1556 г. в местности сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности пеинсвикк, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
